<<<<<<< HEAD Categories on Eduardo Bustamante | Cybersecurity Student & SOC Analyst http://localhost:1313/categories/ Recent content on Eduardo Bustamante | Cybersecurity Student & SOC Analyst ======= Categories on Eduardo Bustamante | Cybersecurity student & SOC Analyst http://localhost:1313/categories/ Recent content on Eduardo Bustamante | Cybersecurity student & SOC Analyst >>>>>>> 8fa8db7e9a7fb3a440dc70d10c9bfb1169fffd61 Hugo en-us Building my portfolio site with Hugo and GitHub Pages http://localhost:1313/writeups/building-portfolio-site/ <<<<<<< HEAD Fri, 03 Apr 2026 00:00:00 +0000 ======= Thu, 03 Apr 2025 00:00:00 +0000 >>>>>>> 8fa8db7e9a7fb3a440dc70d10c9bfb1169fffd61 http://localhost:1313/writeups/building-portfolio-site/

I wanted a portfolio site that actually looked like something I built rather than something I dragged and dropped together. Most security portfolio sites look identical, a template with a headshot, a skills progress bar, and a contact form. I wanted something cleaner and more intentional, so I built mine from scratch using Hugo and deployed it on GitHub Pages with a custom domain.

This writeup covers how I built it, the problems I ran into, and the security decisions I made along the way.
